summary: Runpod exposes an authenticated REST API at https://rest.runpod.io/v1 (API key via `Authorization: Bearer ...`), an authenticated GraphQL API at https://api.runpod.io/graphql (API key via `api_key` query param), an authenticated Runpod API MCP server (uses the same API key), a public docs MCP server, plus two CLIs: `flash` (login with Runpod API key or `RUNPOD_API_KEY`) and `runpodctl` (configure with API key via `runpodctl doctor` or `runpodctl config --apiKey`).
